mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS verification_post_id, c.id AS challenge_id, c.host_id AS host_id, COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(i.id) FROM certification_post_images i WHERE i.post_id = p.id AND i.deleted_at IS NULL ), p.id ) AS review_image_id, c.title AS challenge_title, c.verification_method AS verification_method, p.certification_status AS previous_post_status, p.contents AS post_content, p.certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT image_url FROM certification_post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_review_results ( challenge_id, host_id, review_image_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, decision, confidence, reason, raw_response, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status ) VALUES ( #{challengeId}, #{hostId}, #{reviewImageId}, #{verificationPostId}, #{reviewMode}, #{decision}, #{confidence}, #{reason}, CAST(#{rawResponse} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{previousPostStatus}, #{newPostStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id, host_id, review_image_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, decision, confidence, reason, raw_response, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status, created_at FROM ai_review_results WHERE id = #{id}
